delicious-apple-dumplings.name: Delicious Apple Dumplings
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Heat sugar, butter, cinnamon, and vanilla in a saucepan over medium heat until sugar dissolves, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; set aside.
Divide crescent roll dough into 16 triangles. Roll 1 apple quarter with 1 dough triangle; arrange in the prepared pan. Pour butter mixture over wrapped apples; pour soda on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 40 to 45 minutes.

delicious-caramelized-onion-pear-and-ros.name: Delicious Caramelized Onion, Pear And Rosemary Quiche
delicious-caramelized-onion-pear-and-ros.original_name: Delicioso quiche de cebolla caramelizada, pera y romero

ingredients.item: 1 cdita de romero fresco finamente picado
40 gr de queso semicurado rallado (gruyere, emmental o queso de cabra suave)
1 cdite of honey or brown sugar

instructions: Prepare the dough. In a bowl, mix the flour with salt. Add cold butter and rub with your fingers up to an sandy texture. Incorporate water gradually to form a homogeneous mass. Wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
To purify the base. Stretch the dough onto a slightly pitted surface and place it in a small mold for quiche or cake. Filling the bottom with a fork and baking at 180 been 3 for 12 minutes. Reserve.

Caramelize onion. Cut the onions into a fine pen. To melt butter into a frying pan with medium-low heat, add onion and a pint of salt. Cooking slowly for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring occasionally, till they are golden and soft. Add Honey and cook 2 more minutes. Withdraw from fire.
Prepare the pear. Peel the pear, remove the heart and cut it into thin sheets. Reserve.
Mezclar el relleno. Batir los huevos con la crema, el queso rallado, el romero, pimienta y una pizca de nuez moscada. Ajustar de sal.
Ride the quiche. To distribute caramelized onion on a prebaked basis. Add the pear sheets evenly and cover with the liquid mixture.
Baking. Take to the oven at 180 been 3 been for 30 to 35 minutes, till the centre's firm and the surface's slightly golden.
Reposar antes de servir. Dejar reposar la quiche 10 minutos antes de cortar para lograr una mejor textura.

delicious-cinnamon-cookies-comedera.name: Delicious Cinnamon Cookies
instructions: At a bowl put butter into boxes and mix with sugar until they are incorporated.
Agrega el huevo y sigue mezclando.
The mixture of flour, cinnamon and leavage can be added from time to time with the help of a pallet to sivel. Mixes up and incorporates the ingredients.
When you have a mass, make a ball inside the bowl and cover it with plastic film.
Deja reposar 10 minutos en el refrigerador.
Enharina tu superficie de trabajo. Extiende la masa con un rodillo, dejando un grosor de 1/2 cm. Con ayuda tu cortador de galletas, presiona sobre la masa.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C and place onto paper to bake onto your trays.
Sprinkle paper with sugar and cinnamon and start placing cookies, leaving 2-3 cm separation between them.
Mete las bandejas al horno durante 12-15 minutos.
Take out the cinnamon cookies and let them rest for another 5 minutes.
Meg with a seawater and cinnamon.

delicious-lettuce-cups-with-honey-chicke.name: Delicious Lettuce Cups With Honey Chicken
delicious-lettuce-cups-with-honey-chicke.original_name: Ricas tacitas de lechuga con pollo a la miel

ingredients.item: ½ cup of purple cabbage cut into tirites

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, preparando todos los ingredientes para estar organizados y cocinar mejor.
In a small bowl, we will add honey, jonjoli oil, soy sauce and rice vinegar. Mix very well till you get a smooth dough.
Now, you're going to heat up a frying pan with olive oil and you're going to get an onion added, and get cold till they're soft.
Then you'll add his garlic and mix them up till they get some light.
It's time to add the ground chicken and mix till it's integrated. Cooking for 4 minutes.
Now, add the broken carrot and mix up till everything's integrated. Cooking for 3 more minutes.
One advice I'll give you is that you get to shredded up with regular ground chicken.
En este punto, debes verter la salsa de miel y vas a mezclarlo con el pollo muy bien hasta que quede bien integrado. Cocina por dos minutos.
It's up to us to add his purple cabbage cut into strips, his soybean germinated and his toasted peanuts. Mix for 3 more minutes.
Tu pollo debe quedar jugoso, pero no tan seco ni con mucha agua.
To serve, you'll have lettuce leaves and add a tablespoon and serve them.
Enjoy!

dill-pickle-potato-salad.name: Dill Pickle Potato Salad

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place 3 lb. small red potatoes, quartered, in a large pot and pour in cold water to cover; season very generously with kosher salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender, 12–16 minutes.
Meanwhile, place 6 Persian cucumbers, trimmed, sliced ¼" thick, and 1 large red onion, finely chopped, in a large heatproof bowl.

Bring ⅔ cup distilled white vinegar, 3 Tbsp. sugar, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat and vigorously whisk in ⅔ cup extra-virgin olive oil. Immediately pour over cucumber mixture. Let sit, stirring occasionally to ensure vegetables are evenly submerged, at least 10 minutes or until potatoes are ready.

Drain potatoes and add to cucumber mixture; toss well to coat (it’s okay if some potatoes fall apart). Add ½ cup coarsely chopped dill, season with lots of freshly ground pepper, and gently mix to combine. Cover potato salad and chill until very cold, at least 2 hours and up to 2 days.
Just before serving, stir potato salad with a large spoon. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Transfer to a serving bowl and top with more dill and season with more pepper.

dons-sweet-tea.name: Don's Sweet Tea
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
Stir sugar into boiling water until dissolved; remove from heat.
Add tea bags and let steep until desired strength is reached, 3 to 5 minutes.
Refrigerate tea until cold, at least 1 hour.

double-chocolate-mocha-trifle.name: Double Chocolate Mocha Trifle
instructions: Prepare brownies according to package directions. Bake and cool completely. Cut into 1 inch cubes.
In a medium bowl, whisk together milk and pudding mix until mixture begins to thicken. Dissolve coffee granules in water and stir into pudding mixture. Fold in whipped topping.

In a glass serving bowl, layer one-third of brownie cubes, one-third of pudding mixture and one-third of candy. Repeat layering until all ingredients are used. Chill 30 minutes in refrigerator before serving.

dry-baklava-with-pistachios-lezzet.name: Dry Baklava With Pistachios

ingredients.item: 1 kg of baklava hard wheat flour  u

2. Mix flour, salt, eggs and juice with your hands in a wide container and knead 10 minutes.

4. Close the dough with a damp cloth and leave it for 3 hours.
5. Leave the materials of the screed in the middle fire by taking a large pot.
6. Continue this processing for 6 minutes after you start boiling and leave it to wait at room temperature by transferring it to a harvest that takes its consistency.
7. The rested pulp is divided into 2 equal parts and get the bezelers from each piece to about 30-35 g.
8. Make cloths into smooth rounds with your hands and smear them.
9. Prevent all your crazes from being dry by closing with intermittent index and superior stretch film so that they will not be worth each other on the bench you lightly.

duck-fat-turkey-breasts-with-green-onion.name: Duck-fat Turkey Breasts With Green Onion Puree
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C. Pat turkey breast dry with paper towels and season both sides liberally with salt and pepper.
Heat a large cast-iron skillet over very high heat. Add the duck fat to the skillet. When the fat shimmers, add the turkey breast, skin-side down, and cook until dark golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes.

Remove skillet from heat and remove the turkey from pan. Carefully stir the butter into the pan juices. Arrange the thyme branches in the skillet to make a bed for the turkey. Place the turkey, seared-side-up, on the thyme and sprinkle the garlic around the sides. Baste the turkey, and transfer the pan to the oven.

Roast, basting every 15 minutes, until a meat thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the breast without touching bone registers 68°C, about 1 hour. Baste once more and transfer the turkey to a platter. Let the turkey rest for at least 20 minutes before slicing and serving.

While the turkey roasts, prepare the puree. In a medium saucepan, heat the stock over medium-high, add the green onions, and simmer until tender, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the scallions to a blender, reserving the cooking liquid. Blend on high until very smooth, about 5 minutes, adding a splash of cooking liquid if necessary to help the blender puree the scallions. Add the cream cheese and blend for 2 minutes more. Season with salt to taste. Slice the turkey breast across the grain and serve with the green-onion puree.

dutch-oven-beef-stew.name: Dutch Oven Beef Stew

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Stir together flour, paprika, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl until well combined. Add beef and toss until evenly coated.

Heat olive oil in a cast iron Dutch oven or large pot over medium-high heat. Sear beef in hot oil until well browned, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Stir in broth, potatoes, mushrooms, carrots, onion, celery, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, and bay leaves.
Cover the pot, reduce heat to low, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until meat and vegetables are tender, about 2 hours 30 minutes.
